title: Why did the DSS choker take so long to activate
display_title: Why did the DSS choker take so long to activate
wikitext:
[]: Why did the DSS choker take so long to activate?             Quote Post by unitM » Fri Jan 23, 2015 7:46 pm Okay. So. Q: Shinji wakes up, he's asked ego-related questions, if he needs to piss, hunger, etc. Eventually Misato comes around to explaining his new fashion statement that's tightly coiled around his neck. It's a device(the DSS choker) that will detonate and kill Shinji(or whoever is wearing it) in case an Eva awakens. Well an Eva does awaken. The choker isn't around Shinji when it does though, so it loosens Kaworu's head off in a spray of chunky blood. The question is, why did it activate - or show any signs of movement - so late into the game? Let's make a quick timeline of events. Shinji learns about the choker(there is no "Shinji obtains the choker" because it's already there when he pops out) Shinji defects to NERV Shinji has a panic attack and Kaworu removes the choker and places it on himself, giving Shinji space to agree to piloting the Eva with him 13 descends - still no hint of movement from the choker 13 fights 13 fuses with an angel, awakens, and opens the Doors of Guf - again, there is no recognition here that the choker is going to detonate anytime soon Only around the time when Kaworu admits defeat with "this isn't the happiness you wanted" do we see the DSS move into action. Which is weird. Because 13 activated in Level EEE, not when the Doors of Guf were opened. And even if you consider it's activation to be when the Doors opened, the choker still doesn't show any hint of detonation then. Why the wait? Why didn't it lop Kaworu's head off in Gendo's basement, like Misato said?

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Jan 23, 2015 8:25 pm It was implied it was Gendo's doing, not Misato's, when the choker activated for Kaworu. IIRC the line was in his conversation with Seele.

[]:             Quote Post by pwhodges » Fri Jan 23, 2015 8:27 pm Because just as he had the power (presumably as an angel) to suppress its fail-safe so that he could take it off Shinji and put it on himself, Kaworu had the power to suppress its being triggered until the point that he gave up and let it kill him for Shinji's sake .

[]:             Quote Post by Cosmo11 » Sat Jan 24, 2015 8:01 am The choker was designed to automatically detonate only if an Eva was awakened, not if it was just being piloted or activated. Also as pwhodges said, Kaworu probably had a role in its delay.

[]:             Quote Post by unitM » Tue Feb 03, 2015 3:41 pm Okay fair fair it probably was Kaworu or Gendo's doing somehow anyways

[]:             Quote Post by KobayashiRiku » Tue Feb 03, 2015 6:41 pm Also, wasn't it said that it was new and/or untested technology? And one thing I think can be agreed upon, no technology is perfect. The fact that it went off means it did its job. Was there ever a discussion of how long it was supposed to take during Ritsuko's dialogue in the holding cell?

[]:             Quote Post by Cosmo11 » Thu Feb 05, 2015 7:02 am KobayashiRiku wrote: Also, wasn't it said that it was new and/or untested technology? And one thing I think can be agreed upon, no technology is perfect. The fact that it went off means it did its job. Was there ever a discussion of how long it was supposed to take during Ritsuko's dialogue in the holding cell?

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Thu Feb 05, 2015 10:25 am Cosmo11 wrote: The choker was designed to automatically detonate only if an Eva was awakened, not if it was just being piloted or activated.

[]:             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Thu Feb 05, 2015 10:19 pm ElMariachi wrote: Which just show how retarded the setting of this thing was: you absolutely want to avoid that Shinji even pilots just to be sure? Then configure the damn thing to detonate if he synchronize with an Eva instead of waiting that the gain ring vortexes of death start appearing in the sky dammit!

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Fri Feb 06, 2015 6:30 am kuribo-04 wrote: Kaworu synchronizes with Eva-13. He instantly dies. Shinji is left alone during the rest of the mission. :(

[]:             Quote Post by pwhodges » Fri Feb 06, 2015 11:58 am ElMariachi wrote: which could be an indication that Asuka and Mari also wear one under their plugsuit..

[]:             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Fri Feb 06, 2015 7:48 pm ElMariachi wrote: Shinji can't open the seal to Lilith's Chamber, the 12th Angel and the spears stay sealed inside the Chamber forever, Gendo and SEELE's plans are thwarted, mankind wins!

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Fri Feb 06, 2015 7:49 pm pwhodges wrote: This is not consistent with Shinji being told it's a symbol of his punishment, though.

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Fri Feb 06, 2015 9:36 pm I feel as though the answer was given in the first 5 posts, particularly with SSD's and pwhodges' posts. Everything else I fear would fair better in an Alternate Universe scenario, a la EoTV 26.

[]:             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Sun Feb 08, 2015 1:00 am ElMariachi wrote: Well, maybe WILLE decided to give to Shinji the extra-meaning of being a symbol of punishment, while for Asuka and Mari it's only a security measure. Maybe they get to take their DSS Choker off when off duty, while Shinji has to keep his 24/7 to symbolize his punishment, mark of Cain style, or something like that?

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Sun Feb 08, 2015 6:25 am kuribo-04 wrote: I think with Kaworu mentioning too that it is "the lilin's punishment" it is implied Shinji is the only one with a DSS Choker.

[]:             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Sun Feb 08, 2015 8:32 am ElMariachi wrote: Indeed, well then we come back to the settings of the DSS Choker being completely retarded, unless WILLE actually intended to make Shinji pilot again.

[]:             Quote Post by FullMetalBiscuit » Mon Feb 09, 2015 12:19 pm Would the activation thingy for the choker not have been out of range most of the time? I also figured that Kaworu just stopped it from activating for a while because Angel magic.

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Mon Feb 09, 2015 12:42 pm FullMetalBiscuit wrote: Would the activation thingy for the choker not have been out of range most of the time?
